zh.Staunton Harrold, Breedon, Leicestershir: 英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾巴登
zh.Sagebury, Worcestershire, England: 英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾

zh.Dethick, Derbyshire, England: 英國德比夏爾德瑟其可
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Dethick於1375年出生在英國德比夏爾德瑟其可時，他的父親William De Dethick II27歲，母親Margery Frankville23歲。他和Margaret de Meynell至少有2個兒子。他於1374年住在英國英格蘭德比夏爾德瑟其可。他去世於1461年在英國英格蘭越可爾享年86歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Dethick于1375年出生在英国德比夏爾德瑟其可时，他的父亲William De Dethick II27岁，母亲Margery Frankville23岁。他和Margaret de Meynell至少有2个儿子。他于1374年住在英国英格兰德比夏爾德瑟其可。他去世于1461年在英国英格兰越可爾享年86岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dethick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Dethick was born in 1375, in Dethick, Derbyshire, England, his father, William De Dethick II, was 27 and his mother, Margery Frankville, was 23. He had at least 2 sons with Margaret de Meynell. He lived in Dethick, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom in 1374. He died in 1461, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 86.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Dethick est né en 1375, à Dethick, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, William De Dethick II, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Margery Frankville, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Margaret de Meynell. Il a vécu à Dethick, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1374. Il est décédé en 1461, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 86 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Dethick 1375 in Dethick, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William De Dethick II 27 und seine Mutter Margery Frankville 23. Er hatte mit Margaret de Meynell mindestens 2 Söhne. 1374 hat er in Dethick, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom gelebt. Er starb 1461 im Alter von 86 Jahren in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Dethick è nato il nel 1375 nel Dethick, Derbyshire, England, il suo padre, William De Dethick II, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Margery Frankville, aveva 23 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli con Margaret de Meynell. Vissuto a Dethick, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito nel 1374. Morì nel 1461, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 86 anni.

ja.Staunton Harrold, Breedon, Leicestershir: イギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアバードン
ja.Sagebury, Worcestershire, England: イギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイア
ja.Towtown, Yorkshire, England: イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイア
ja.Dethick Lea and Holloway, Derbyshire, En: イギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアデスイック
ja.Dethick, Derbyshire, England: イギリスデルブイシュアイアデスイック
ja.lifeSummary: John Dethickが1375年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアデスイックで生まれた時，父William De Dethick IIは27歳，母Margery Frankvilleは23歳であった。彼はMargaret de Meynellとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼は1374年にはイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアデスイックに住んでいた。彼は1461年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで86歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Dethick(이)가 1375년 영국 더비실르 데스이c크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William De Dethick II(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Frankville(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Margaret de Meynell(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 1374년도에 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 데스이c크에서 살았다. 그는 1461년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 86세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Staunton Harrold, Breedon, Leicestershir: Bardon, Ratae Coritanorum, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс
mn.Dethick Lea and Holloway, Derbyshire, En: Dethick, Deorbyscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Dethick nasceu em 1375, em Dethick, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William De Dethick II, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Margery Frankville, tinha 23 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Margaret de Meynell. Ele viveu em Dethick, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1374. Ele faleceu em 1461, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 86 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Dethick родился в 1375 г. в местности детикк, дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени William De Dethick II было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Frankville, 23. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от Margaret de Meynell. Он жил в местности детикк, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания в 1374 году. Он умер в 1461 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 86 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Dethick nació en 1375, en Dethick, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William De Dethick II, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Margery Frankville, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Margaret de Meynell. Vivió en Dethick, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido en 1374. Murió en 1461, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 86 años.
